$comment: Per-versionGroup BLOCKER reasons for .syncpackrc.json. Keys match the `label` field exactly. Enforced by scripts/check-syncpack-reasons.ts. Lives in a sidecar because syncpack's config schema rejects unknown fields.
Workspace dependencies should use wildca: BLOCKER: cross-workspace @rediacc/* deps must resolve to the local workspace copy via '*'; any fixed version would break the workspace graph
Pin @types/node to latest: BLOCKER: @types/node major must match the Node engine (22.x); v25+ targets Node 25 APIs we do not ship and would introduce unused type surface
Pin OpenTelemetry exporter-trace to the: BLOCKER: the OTLP trace exporter must move in lockstep with the sdk-node 0.219 pin; mixing the 0.219 SDK with a newer exporter line splits @opentelemetry/core into incompatible copies and breaks span export at runtime
Pin OpenTelemetry sdk-node for CLI: BLOCKER: sdk-node is held on the 0.219 line together with the exporter pin; later lines force protobufjs 8.x which @grpc/proto-loader in our tree does not accept yet
Pin OpenTelemetry resources to compatibl: BLOCKER: @opentelemetry/resources 2.8.x is the line that pairs with the 0.219 sdk-node pin; moving further requires a coordinated OTel bump across sdk-node + exporter
Pin vite-tsconfig-paths to latest: BLOCKER: vite-tsconfig-paths 6.0.x is required for Vite 6 compatibility; older 5.x silently breaks path alias resolution at build time
Ensure consistent dependency versions ac: BLOCKER: sameRange policy for prod+dev deps is a global consistency rule, not a pin; ensures cross-workspace ranges never diverge (no per-dep reason applies)
Pin i18next for CLI: BLOCKER: i18next is pinned so any future workspace that adopts it stays on the CLI’s line; divergent copies fragment translation key resolution at runtime
